kundli.re_aligning_the_celestial_coor: Re-aligning the celestial coordinates for your profile. Please wait...
kundli.unlock_the_secrets_of_your_lif: Unlock the secrets of your life with our precise Vedic birth chart — generated using high-precision astronomical algorithms.
kundli.a_janam_kundli_also_known_as_a: A Janam Kundli, also known as a birth chart or natal chart, is a precise astronomical map of the sky at the exact moment of a person's birth. In Vedic astrology, the Kundli serves as the foundational document of a person's entire astrological profile — capturing the positions of the Sun, Moon, and all nine planets (Navagrahas) across the 12 houses of the zodiac.
kundli.the_word_kundli_is_derived_fro: The word "Kundli" is derived from the Sanskrit word meaning "coiled" — a reference to the serpentine energy of life that the chart is believed to contain. Every Janam Kundli is unique to the individual, determined by three key factors: the date of birth, the exact time of birth, and the place of birth. Even twins born minutes apart can have meaningfully different Kundlis.
kundli.for_centuries_the_janam_kundli: For centuries, the Janam Kundli has been used in Indian culture to understand a person's strengths, challenges, career path, relationship compatibility, health tendencies, and the timing of major life events. It is consulted for important decisions such as marriage, business ventures, naming ceremonies, and more.
kundli.the_kundli_is_divided_into_12: The Kundli is divided into 12 houses (Bhavas), each governing a specific area of life. The planets placed within these houses at the time of birth influence how that area of life unfolds for the individual. The first house — the Lagna or Ascendant — is considered the most important, as it sets the orientation of the entire chart.
kundli.the_navagrahas_nine_planets_in: The Navagrahas — Nine Planets in Vedic Astrology
kundli.vedic_astrology_recognises_nin: Vedic astrology recognises nine celestial bodies known as the Navagrahas. Unlike Western astrology, Vedic astrology includes the lunar nodes Rahu and Ketu as shadow planets, and does not use Uranus, Neptune, or Pluto. Each Graha governs specific areas of life and influences the houses it occupies or aspects in the Kundli.
kundli.how_to_read_your_janam_kundli: How to Read Your Janam Kundli
kundli.reading_a_kundli_involves_unde: Reading a Kundli involves understanding the interplay of planets, houses, signs, and aspects. Here are the key elements to focus on when exploring your birth chart.
kundli.enter_your_birth_details_below: Enter your birth details below to generate your personalised Vedic birth chart instantly.

chinese_horoscope.select_your_celestial_animal_t: Select your celestial animal to discover what the lunar energies have in store for your
chinese_horoscope._the_lunar_cycle_reveals_the_w: "The lunar cycle reveals the wisdom of ancient skies. Your animal spirit carries lessons passed down through centuries — select yours to uncover what the
chinese_horoscope.the_chinese_horoscope_is_one_o: The Chinese Horoscope is one of the oldest and most widely followed astrological systems in the world, with roots stretching back over 2,000 years. Unlike Western astrology, which assigns signs based on the month of birth, Chinese astrology is based on the lunar calendar and assigns each person a zodiac animal based on their birth year.
chinese_horoscope.the_chinese_zodiac_consists_of: The Chinese Zodiac consists of 12 animals — Rat, Ox, Tiger, Rabbit, Dragon, Snake, Horse, Goat, Monkey, Rooster, Dog, and Pig — each representing a year in a 12-year cycle. According to ancient Chinese legend, the Jade Emperor held a great race and the 12 animals that finished were awarded a year in the zodiac in the order they arrived.
chinese_horoscope.each_animal_sign_carries_a_dis: Each animal sign carries a distinct set of personality traits, strengths, weaknesses, and life tendencies. Your Chinese zodiac sign, combined with the ruling element of your birth year, provides a deep and nuanced portrait of your nature, destiny, and the energies that guide your path.
chinese_horoscope.the_five_elements_in_chinese_a: The Five Elements in Chinese Astrology
chinese_horoscope.in_addition_to_the_12_year_ani: In addition to the 12-year animal cycle, Chinese astrology incorporates five natural elements — Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, and Water — each governing a two-year period within every 10-year cycle. The element of your birth year significantly shapes your personality, adding a further layer of depth to your animal sign.
chinese_horoscope.for_example_a_wood_dragon_and: For example, a Wood Dragon and a Fire Dragon share the same core animal traits but express them in meaningfully different ways. Understanding your element helps you make sense of your natural tendencies, how you relate to others, and the types of energy that fuel or challenge you.
chinese_horoscope.each_of_the_12_animals_carries: Each of the 12 animals carries a unique set of qualities that influence the personality, fortune, and life path of those born in its year. Here is a brief profile of all 12 signs.
chinese_horoscope.how_to_read_your_chinese_horos: How to Read Your Chinese Horoscope
chinese_horoscope.a_chinese_horoscope_reading_dr: A Chinese horoscope reading draws on multiple layers of information — your animal sign, your ruling element, the current lunar year, and the interaction between these forces. Here is how to get the most from your daily reading.

gemstone.gems_or_gemstones_play_an_impo: Gems or Gemstones play an important role in
gemstone.specifically_for_remedial_purp: specifically for remedial purposes. These are worn as jewellery or used as a beautiful ornament since ancient times by many kings and royal people. The main reason behind wearing gemstones is healing. Throughout history, it has been used for healing and spiritual rituals. Although gems were rare and exhibited great beauty, the reason they were so precious was due to the power they imparted to their wearers. They are storehouses of cosmic energies, which transmit when the stone gets in contact with one's body. Gems exhibit their power in a beneficial or detrimental way — depending on how they are used. All stones or gems have magnetic powers in varying degrees, and many of them are beneficial to us for their therapeutic cures. They emit vibrations and frequencies which have strong potential influence on our whole being. Here's what your Gemstone prediction looks like.
gemstone.our_divine_earth_has_natural_s: Our divine Earth has natural sources of minerals and gemstones. These gemstones and crystals have mysterious powers, healing qualities and spiritual meanings. These are commonly known as Birthstones or Gemstones. They are precious or semi-precious type, depending upon their quality and cost. Every planet combined with a specific gemstone helps in balancing the effects of that planet upon us.
gemstone.it_is_preferable_to_wear_only: It is preferable to wear only a suitable gemstone according to your
gemstone.because_if_you_wear_one_that_i: because, if you wear one that is not suitable for you, it may result in miseries and troubles in life.
gemstone.these_days_everyone_is_asking: These days everyone is asking these questions and seeking solutions for them. Questions like why should I wear a gemstone, what is my lucky stone, what is the advantage of wearing a Gemstone, which gemstones should I wear, what is a good luck gemstone, what stones attract money, how to choose the right Gemstone,
gemstone.how_to_know_my_lucky_gemstone: how to know my lucky Gemstone
gemstone._which_gemstone_should_i_wear: , which Gemstone should I wear according to ascendant (Lagna), which stone is suitable for me, under what circumstances a Gemstone should be worn and why, etc. Such questions are often considered by people as they don't know the wearing process of gemstones.
gemstone.let_s_discuss_all_of_your_ques: Let's discuss all of your questions in this article, which you should read till the end to get solutions for all of your gemstone-related queries.
gemstone.ascendant_is_the_most_importan: Ascendant is the most important house of any birth chart as it rules our body. If body is there, then only we can enjoy good times or may face bad times. If
gemstone.or_its_lord_is_weak_a_person_m: or its lord is weak, a person may suffer from health issues, insults, etc. So the Gemstone of the Ascendant lord should be worn to give strength to the Ascendant House. Fifth and Ninth Houses are the powerful and sacred Trine Houses of any chart. If their lords are weak, a person's luck might not favour them and struggle would increase in their life. Hence, to improve them, gemstones of Fifth as well as Ninth house lords should be worn.
gemstone.there_are_certain_houses_that: There are certain houses that affect the Ascendant House in some way. Such as Maraka Houses (2nd and 7th Houses), Trik Houses (3rd, 6th and 11th Houses) and Death House (8th House), which are not considered good for the Ascendant House. Therefore, gemstones of these house lords should be avoided.
gemstone.as_per_quality_effects_purity: As per quality, effects, purity and cost, gemstones can be divided into two parts viz. Precious Stones and Semi-Precious Stones. To know more about them, please continue reading this article.
gemstone.precious_gemstones_are_expensi: Precious gemstones are expensive, and of superlative, best and good quality. Since they preserve quality, their effects are swift and strong. They are also used for healing and spiritual practices. Rich people use these gemstones as jewelleries. Some examples of precious stones are
gemstone.gemstones_that_are_not_much_ex: Gemstones that are not much expensive and can be worn in place of precious stones as substitutes, are called semi-precious stones. These are also effective and bestow desired results after wearing in a proper way. These stones can also be adorned as jewelleries. A few examples of semi-precious stones are
gemstone._agate_labradorite_amber_quart: , Agate, Labradorite, Amber, Quartz and Lapis Lazuli.
gemstone.every_ascendant_has_a_differen: Every ascendant has a different ruling planet with a set of friendly planets. If you wear friendly gemstones, you would enjoy good fruits of them in your life, otherwise you may face trouble and disturbances. However, being beneficial or friendly planets did not mean that they will always remain beneficial. It rather should be testified by an expert astrologer, after carefully examining planetary positions, aspects and their strength, to come to a conclusion about ascendant-specific suitable gemstones. At least three gemstones are found suitable for any ascendant. It is up to your astrologer to advise you to wear either all three gemstones or two out of three or only one. In some specific cases, astrologers may suggest you not to wear any gemstone because of the ill-placement of a particular planet in your birthchart. In such cases, you can wear
gemstone.of_that_planet_take_a_look_at: of that planet. Take a look at following details regarding which gemstones are suitable for you according to your ascendant or rising sign:
gemstone.how_and_when_to_wear_a_gemston: How and When to Wear a Gemstone?
gemstone.now_when_you_came_to_know_as_t: Now when you came to know as to which gemstone is best for you for your overall betterment, a set of new questions arises like which gemstone should I wear, in which finger? When to wear the Gemstone? What is the
gemstone.of_wearing_a_gemstone_method_o: of wearing a Gemstone? Method of wearing the Gemstone ring?
gemstone.every_good_step_must_be_taken: Every good step must be taken during good time and good muhurat. So if you are going to wear any gemstone, first you must see the best time to wear it. Every stone has its own planetary lord so that specific gemstone must be worn during the day of that planet, the
gemstone.and_the_hora_of_the_planet_to: and the Hora of the planet to get maximum benefits from it. You should also follow a gemstone cleansing process, then after proper cleaning and energising it, you can wear it. To know about the wearing process in depth, you may click on the links given at the end of this article for each gemstone.
gemstone.now_you_may_think_about_which: Now you may think about which gemstones should not be worn together? Because wearing incompatible gemstones together would create a fuss in your life. Hence, to avoid that situation and to enjoy the good fruits of your suitable gemstones, we will help you to know which gemstones are compatible with each other, and which should not be worn with incompatible ones. The answer is simple, i.e. Gemstones of the planets having enmity with each-other should not be worn together, because they may develop troubles in your life. The planets which share friendship with each other, their gemstones should be worn together to improve their good results in your life. To know about that, you should read the following:
gemstone.it_is_evident_that_wearing_a_g: It is evident that wearing a good quality and suitable gemstone would not only improve your health and mental stability but also improves your career, love life, rise and success in the times to come. Furthermore, it improves your physical powers by giving a boon to your immunity and increases your willpower and confidence.
gemstone.therefore_you_should_consult_w: Therefore, you should consult with an expert astrologer before wearing any gemstones and should wear one that suits you completely according to your birth chart. Also, do not forget to follow the correct procedure and ritual while wearing a gemstone.
gemstone.while_wearing_a_gem_please_kee: While wearing a gem please keep certain things in mind. Purchase only original gemstones as wearing those that are not original will have no effect. You also need to wear the prescribed weight, what is commonly known as “Ratti”. Nowadays markets are flooded with fake gems. Always buy certified gemstones from a trusted source. Consult an expert astrologer before wearing any gemstone.
gemstone.need_personalized_guidance_on: Need personalized guidance on gemstone weight, purification process, or wearing time? Consult our expert astrologers.
gemstone.find_your_lucky_stone_accordin: Find your lucky Stone according to Indian astrology
gemstone.see_how_gemstones_can_change_y: See how gemstones can change your life, luck, punya, health and more. With wearing instructions and mantras, gemstones recommended here are based on your ascendant Rashi lord.

kaal_sarp._your_birth_chart_is_remarkabl: "Your birth chart is remarkably balanced. The planets are spread across the houses without being hemmed by the shadow axis of Rahu and Ketu, indicating a path of freedom and prosperity."
kaal_sarp.since_your_chart_is_free_from: Since your chart is free from major axial imbalances, you can focus on amplifying your existing strengths. Maintenance of spiritual hygiene ensures these benefits remain constant throughout your life transits.
kaal_sarp.consider_these_daily_affirmati: Consider these daily affirmations and practices to keep your cosmic flow uninterrupted:
kaal_sarp.to_deal_with_the_problems_caus: To deal with the problems caused by
kaal_sarp.kalsarpa_yoga_here_are_few_rem: Kalsarpa Yoga, here are few remedies:
kaal_sarp.looking_for_personalized_guida: Looking for personalized guidance? Consult an expert astrologer.
kaal_sarp.kaal_sarp_dosh_and_its_effects: Kaal Sarp Dosh and its Effects
kaal_sarp.find_your_specific_kaal_sarp_y: Find your specific Kaal Sarp Yoga type according to Indian astrology
kaal_sarp.kaal_sarp_dosh_is_formed_when: Kaal Sarp Dosh is formed when all planets fall on one side of the Rahu–Ketu axis in a birth chart. Enter your birth details below to find out if this yoga is present in your horoscope and how it impacts your life.
kaal_sarp.is_formed_when_all_seven_major: is formed when all seven major planets — Sun, Moon, Mercury, Venus, Mars, Jupiter, and Saturn — are hemmed between the shadow planets Rahu and Ketu. Since Rahu and Ketu are always exactly 180° apart from each other, there is a possibility that all other seven planets can occupy the space between these two nodes. This positioning in a horoscope is known as Kaal Sarp Yog.
kaal_sarp.it_is_also_important_to_check: It is also important to check the degrees of the planets while analysing the chart for Kaal Sarp Dosh. For example, if Mars and Rahu are in the same sign and Mars has 10 degrees while Rahu has 10.5 degrees, it is considered
kaal_sarp._however_if_mars_has_10_5_degr: . However, if Mars has 10.5 degrees and Rahu has 10 degrees, Mars is not lying within the Rahu–Ketu axis and thus it would not be considered a Kaal Sarp Yog. The degrees of Rahu and Ketu must be higher than the other seven planets in the same sign for this yoga to form.
kaal_sarp.since_this_yoga_is_formed_thro: Since this yoga is formed through the influence of Rahu and Ketu, it is important to understand what these two shadow planets represent in
kaal_sarp._it_is_a_chhaya_graha_shadow_p: . It is a Chhaya Graha (shadow planet) representing the north node of the Moon. Rahu is associated with obsession, illusion, materialism, and sudden upheavals. It behaves much like Saturn and can create unconventional thinking and insatiable desires in one's life.
kaal_sarp._the_south_node_and_the_counte: — the south node and the counterpart of Rahu. Ketu governs spirituality, liberation (moksha), detachment, and past-life karma. It is considered a deeply mystical planet that seeks spiritual attainment rather than material gain. Ketu behaves like Mars in its effects.
kaal_sarp.different_types_of_kaal_sarp_y: Different Types of Kaal Sarp Yog
kaal_sarp.since_there_are_12_houses_in_a: Since there are 12 houses in a birth chart, Kaal Sarp Yog can form in 12 distinct ways. Each type carries its own character, influenced by the houses in which Rahu and Ketu are placed:
kaal_sarp.each_type_affects_different_as: Each type affects different aspects of life. The detailed effects and remedies for each type are presented in your personalized report above after you enter your birth details.
kaal_sarp.generally_it_is_believed_that: Generally, it is believed that this yoga creates misfortune, but the actual impact depends heavily on where Rahu and Ketu sit and how other planets are positioned. For example:
kaal_sarp.kaal_sarp_yog_also_has_a_const: Kaal Sarp Yog also has a constructive side. Many well-known leaders have this yoga. It can make individuals exceptionally driven, resourceful, and resilient, leading to great recognition in the latter half of life.
kaal_sarp._these_remedies_are_supportive: * These remedies are supportive practices. For specific guidance tailored to your chart, a personal consultation is recommended.

free_reports.access_our_high_precision_vedi: Access our high-precision Vedic analysis suite. Based on ancient mathematical frameworks and professional astrological insights.
free_reports.our_professional_vedic_reports: Our professional Vedic reports are designed to help you decode the influence of heavenly bodies on your karmic journey. Here is a brief look at why these calculations are essential for balanced living.
free_reports.occurs_when_all_seven_planets: occurs when all seven planets are hemmed between the shadow planets Rahu and Ketu. This alignment can act as a celestial "blockage," leading to unforeseen hurdles in career, health, and progeny. Identifying the specific type (such as
free_reports._allows_for_targeted_remedies: ) allows for targeted remedies to restore life’s flow.
free_reports._when_chosen_correctly_based_o: . When chosen correctly based on your ascendant (Lagna), they transmit specific frequencies that balance your magnetic aura. However, wearing a stone of a
free_reports._killer_house_can_be_detriment: (killer) house can be detrimental. Our analysis strictly follows Vedic principles to ensure only beneficial recommendations.
free_reports.of_the_zodiac_his_7_5_year_tra: of the zodiac. His 7.5-year transit over your natal Moon sign—divided into three stages—is a period of karmic auditing. While it brings intense pressure, it is also a time for your soul's foundation to be strengthened. Knowing your exact phase helps you manage expectations and perform specific healing practices (Remedies) for mental peace.
free_reports.automated_reports_provide_tech: Automated reports provide technical data, but a live conversation with an expert can help you understand the subtle nuances of your unique birth chart.

sade_sati.is_a_significant_7_5_year_astr: is a significant 7.5-year astrological phase that often carries a sense of apprehension. However, in the light of
sade_sati._it_is_seen_as_a_powerful_peri: , it is seen as a powerful period of karmic cleansing and personal transformation. This cycle occurs when the planet Saturn (Shani Dev) transits through the three signs neighboring your natal Moon—specifically the 12th, 1st, and 2nd houses from your Moon sign.
sade_sati.of_the_cosmos_judging_us_based: of the cosmos, judging us based on our past deeds and patience. While this phase can bring challenges, delays, and anxieties, its ultimate purpose is to instill discipline, resilience, and maturity. It is not merely a period of hardship; for many, it becomes the foundation for their greatest life achievements and recognition.
sade_sati.the_three_stages_charans_of_sa: The Three Stages (Charans) of Sade Sati
sade_sati.saturn_takes_approximately_2_5: Saturn takes approximately 2.5 years to transit through a single zodiac sign. Since Sade Sati involves three signs, the total duration comes to
sade_sati._these_years_are_divided_into: . These years are divided into three distinct "Charans" or phases, each with its own influence:
sade_sati.this_phase_begins_when_saturn: This phase begins when Saturn enters the 12th house from your Moon sign. It often targets your subconscious and external stability. You may experience aimless travel, unexpected financial hurdles, or a sense of isolation. It forces you to look inward and address hidden insecurities.
sade_sati.the_most_intense_stage_occurs: The most intense stage occurs when Saturn transits directly over your
sade_sati._this_influences_your_physical: . This influences your physical health, mental focus, and domestic peace. While demanding, it provides the "Golden Opportunity" to build ironclad discipline and overcome the ego.
sade_sati.in_the_final_stage_saturn_move: In the final stage, Saturn moves into the 2nd house from the Moon. You will feel a sense of relief as the pressure gradually lifts. Focus shifts to financial stabilization and family responsibilities. It is a period of harvesting the hard-earned lessons of the previous five years.
sade_sati._shani_dev_is_the_strict_judge: "Shani Dev is the strict judge who keeps an eye over your patience. Perform your karma with integrity, and this period will eventually bless you with success and unshakable happiness."

horoscope_matching.hindu_scriptures_consider_marr: Hindu Scriptures consider marriage a holy union planned even before taking birth. Kundli Matching reveals deep cosmic compatibility — guiding two souls toward a harmonious, fulfilling life together.
horoscope_matching.where_marriage_is_the_most_sac: Where marriage is the most sacred cornerstone in India, Vedic astrology offers a time-tested science to nullify bad effects after marriage, identify doshas, and chart a path toward lasting happiness.
horoscope_matching.in_hinduism_the_horoscopes_of: In Hinduism, the horoscopes of both boy and girl are matched to nullify any bad effects after marriage. Everyone wants a good spouse with whom they can create beautiful memories and feel truly happy. In case of any doshas, astrology offers several remedies and solutions to overcome malefic effects.
horoscope_matching.check_marriage_compatibility_u: Check marriage compatibility using traditional regional systems and Manglik Dosha analysis.

lal_kitab.enter_your_birth_details_below: Enter your birth details below to generate your personalized Lal Kitab planetary interpretation and remedies instantly.
lal_kitab.landing_desc: Experience the unique "Red Book" of astrology. Discover practical planetary remedies that harmonize your life, neutralize malefic effects, and unlock your hidden potential.
lal_kitab.what_desc_1: Lal Kitab, literally translated as the "Red Book," is a branch of Vedic astrology famous for its simple and cost-effective remedies. Unlike traditional astrology, it focuses on house positions and treats planets as "guests" in your life's journey.
lal_kitab.what_desc_2: It was compiled in the early 20th century and has become legendary for the speed and effectiveness of its "Upayas" (remedies). Our AI engine utilizes 200+ traditional rules to synthesize a report that is both ancient in wisdom and modern in precision.
lal_kitab.how_it_differs: How Lal Kitab Differs from Vedic Astrology
lal_kitab.nine_planets_desc: In Lal Kitab, each planet (Graha) carries a distinct personality and governs specific areas of life. Their placement and dignity shape your unique remedial prescription.
lal_kitab.types_of_upayas_desc: Remedies in Lal Kitab are grouped into categories. Most require no expense — only intention, consistency, and the right timing.
lal_kitab.twelve_houses_desc: In Lal Kitab, the Bhava (house) is the most critical factor — each planet's behavior changes entirely based on which house it occupies.
lal_kitab.select_city_error: Please search and select your birth city from the list.
lal_kitab.upgrade_desc: We have upgraded the Lal Kitab experience. Please start a new calculation to experience the new depth.

planets.are_not_just_celestial_bodies: are not just celestial bodies but powerful forces that shape human destiny. Each planet represents a specific energy, a psychological archetype, and a department of life—from the soul-power of the Sun to the discipline of Saturn.
planets.understanding_these_planets_is: Understanding these planets is the first step to mastering the art of Jyotish. This library provides a deep dive into the traits, elements, sanskrit significance, and remedies for all primary celestial influencers. Whether you are a student or a seeker, these profiles will help you decode the planetary language.

directory.expertly_calculated_auspicious: Expertly calculated auspicious dates for all major life events in 2026.
directory._in_hinduism_referring_to_the: "In Hinduism, referring to the Panchang and calculating an auspicious muhurat before commencing any big task or taking a huge step in life is a common practice. As per Astrology, Shubh Muhurat refers to the time when the placement of planets and nakshatras prove to be beneficial for the native."
directory.firstly_know_about_some_shubh: Firstly, know about some Shubh Muhurats in 2026 for carrying out several auspicious practices such as-
directory.according_to_astrology_any_tas: According to Astrology, any task must be commenced after choosing the right day and time in order for it to deliver favourable results. Since Vedic times, there has been an ongoing tradition of calculating an auspicious muhurat before commencing any important task.
directory.however_in_today_s_modern_time: However, in today's modern times, people give less importance to such beliefs and commence any task or activity without taking into consideration all these aspects.
directory.types_and_nature_of_shubh_muhu: Types and Nature Of Shubh Muhurat
directory.before_going_ahead_with_shubh: Before going ahead with Shubh Muhurat 2026 dates, you should understand according to the Hindu Panchang, there are a total of 30 auspicious muhurats in a whole day comprising a total of 24 hours. The first Muhurat "Rudra", which is considered an inauspicious muhurat, begins at 6 AM. After that, the second Muhurat is Ahi, which starts exactly 48 minutes after Rudra Muhurat. This is also considered an inauspicious duration. In this manner, we have provided you with a list of all the muhurats as followed along with their elementary nature. One thing to keep in mind is that all of these muhurats are approximately 48 minutes long.
directory.a_tithi_or_date_as_per_the_ved: A Tithi or Date as per the Vedic Panchang begins from Sunrise and ends on the Sunrise the very next day. At times, two Tithis can occur in a day. Out of them, a Tithi which ends before the Sunrise is known as Kshaya Tithi, whereas a Tithi which remains till two Sunrises is known as Vriddhi Tithi. As per the Panchang, a month comprises a total of 30 Tithis further divided into 15-15 days falling under the Shukla and Krishna Paksha. Auspicious Muhurats in 2026 are evaluated keeping in mind these Tithis. Let us know the names of all the dates falling under the Shukla Paksha and Krishna Paksha.
directory.according_to_the_panchang_ther: According to the Panchang, there are a total of seven Vaar i.e. seven days in a week, that are: Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday and Sunday.
directory.each_of_these_days_has_its_own: Each of these days has its own characteristics and nature. Shubh Muhurat are calculated keeping in mind the day as well.
directory.there_are_certain_days_of_the: There are certain days of the week during which carrying out any religious work is forbidden, such as Tuesday. On the other hand, Sunday and Thursday are considered the best days. Out of these both, Thursday is considered the most auspicious, because the direction of the Guru is Northeast and as per the beliefs, all the Gods reside in the northeast direction.
directory.while_calculating_all_the_ausp: While calculating all the auspicious muhurats for 2026, Nakshatra holds high importance. There are 27 Nakshatras in total. Let us know the names of all the nakshatras and their ruling planets.
